title: BEM-709 autonomy start
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport','governance/autonomy','governance/scheduled_tasks','governance/tests/autonomy','governance/handoff']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 05:20 (UTC+3)'
# Accept roadmap into work and create strict execution state.
roadmap_state={'schema_version':'gpt_full_autonomy_execution.v1','bem':'BEM-709','status':'accepted_into_work','source_roadmap':'governance/roadmap/GPT_FULL_AUTONOMY_ROADMAP_BEM708.md','current_stage':'A2_A3','operator_instruction':'execute roadmap to result; reports do not stop development','roadmap_implementation':'autonomy roadmap active; product/protocol implementation remains paused','blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem709_accept_autonomy_roadmap_and_start_a2a3.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(roadmap_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Create proof schema for task confirmation and scheduled runs.
proof_schema=Path('governance/autonomy/chatgpt_task_proof_schema.json')
proof_schema.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'chatgpt_task_proof_schema.v1','required_fields':['task_name','schedule','confirmation_source','created_at','run_proofs'],'pass_rules':{'task_confirmation':'task-card or platform confirmation required','run_proofs':'at least two scheduled run results with timestamps','no_operator_relay':'operator must not relay Claude content'},'status_values':['pending_confirmation','confirmed','two_runs_verified','failed']},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Create current A2 gate file: no false PASS; confirmation must be external/platform evidence.
gate=Path('governance/autonomy/a2_chatgpt_recurring_task_gate.json')
gate.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'a2_chatgpt_recurring_task_gate.v1','stage':'A2','task_name':'AI DevOps Claude mailbox monitor','requested_schedule':'every 1 minute or minimal available recurring interval','status':'pending_task_confirmation','pass_requires':'task-card/task-confirmation plus scheduled interval evidence','blocker':{'code':'TASK_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED','message':'GPT cannot mark A2 PASS until ChatGPT Tasks platform confirms recurring task.'},'created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Create task command artifact for exact task creation/update. This is the command the scheduled-task subsystem must accept.
task_prompt=Path('governance/scheduled_tasks/AI_DEVOPS_CLAUDE_MAILBOX_MONITOR_RECURRING_TASK.md')
task_prompt.write_text('# AI DevOps Claude mailbox monitor | recurring task request'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Статус: pending_task_confirmation'+sep+sep+'Создай или обнови повторяющуюся задачу.'+sep+sep+'Название: AI DevOps Claude mailbox monitor.'+sep+sep+'Расписание: каждые 1 минуту. Если интервал 1 минута недоступен, установи минимально доступный повторяющийся интервал.'+sep+sep+'Инструкция:'+sep+'КОНТРАКТ ПРИНЯТ. Это scheduled monitor task для ai-devops-system.'+sep+sep+'Каждый запуск:'+sep+'1. Выполни Deno healthCheck.'+sep+'2. Проверь active agreements: governance/agreements/active/.'+sep+'3. Проверь mailbox Claude → GPT: governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ и governance/audit_mailbox/external_auditor_to_internal_auditor/.'+sep+'4. Если найден новый ответ Claude с APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED — создай Codex task для фиксации результата, обнови active agreement и подготовь следующий шаг согласования.'+sep+'5. Если ответа нет — не отправляй оператору длинный отчёт; при необходимости зафиксируй no_new_mail в state.'+sep+'6. Roadmap implementation не запускать без явной команды оператора resume.'+sep+'7. No issue comments.'+sep)
# Create A3 run ledger. Scheduled task must write/append or Codex task records runs here.
ledger=Path('governance/autonomy/a3_scheduled_run_proofs.json')
if not ledger.exists():
    ledger.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'a3_scheduled_run_proofs.v1','stage':'A3','task_name':'AI DevOps Claude mailbox monitor','status':'waiting_for_runs','required_runs':2,'runs':[],'blocker':{'code':'TWO_RUN_PROOF_MISSING','message':'Need two scheduled run proofs with timestamps.'},'created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Create test harness artifact: what the scheduled task must do on every run.
harness=Path('governance/tests/autonomy/scheduled_monitor_run_checklist.md')
harness.write_text('# Scheduled monitor run checklist'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Каждый запуск task должен зафиксировать:'+sep+'1. Deno healthCheck result.'+sep+'2. active agreements count.'+sep+'3. Claude mailbox scan result.'+sep+'4. detected decision if any.'+sep+'5. Codex task created if decision exists.'+sep+'6. no operator relay.'+sep+sep+'PASS A3 только после двух запусков.'+sep)
# Handoff for next GPT/session and scheduled task.
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | AUTONOMY A2/A3 ACTIVE'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'BEM-708 autonomy roadmap accepted into work. Current stage: A2/A3.'+sep+sep+'Do not mark full autonomy PASS until recurring ChatGPT Task confirmation and two run proofs exist.'+sep+sep+'Read:'+sep+'- governance/autonomy/a2_chatgpt_recurring_task_gate.json'+sep+'- governance/autonomy/a3_scheduled_run_proofs.json'+sep+'- governance/scheduled_tasks/AI_DEVOPS_CLAUDE_MAILBOX_MONITOR_RECURRING_TASK.md'+sep)
# Report/transport/proof.
report=Path('governance/reports/bem709_accept_autonomy_roadmap_and_start_a2a3.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-709 | Accept Autonomy Roadmap And Start A2/A3 | STARTED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'A2/A3 execution state created. PASS is blocked until ChatGPT recurring task confirmation and two scheduled run proofs exist.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: TASK_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem709_accept_autonomy_roadmap_and_start_a2a3','status':'accepted_into_work','current_stage':'A2_A3','blocker':'TASK_CONFIRMATION_REQUIRED until task confirmation exists','created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem709_accept_autonomy_roadmap_and_start_a2a3.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-709 STARTED: autonomy roadmap accepted; A2/A3 gates created; task confirmation required.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(state_file),str(proof_schema),str(gate),str(task_prompt),str(ledger),str(harness),str(handoff),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Accepted full GPT autonomy roadmap into work; created A2 task confirmation gate, A3 scheduled run proof ledger, task prompt, checklist, handoff, and evidence files')
"""
No issue comments.
